name: Hoax.ai Evidence Posture Workbench Interface State Contracts

interface_states.allowed_display_meaning: Governed chamber ready; no posture output yet.
interface_states.forbidden_display_meaning: Upload ready, scan ready, detector idle.
interface_states.non_authorization_statement: This state does not authorize interface, prototype, engine, scoring, verdict, or public output.

interface_states.allowed_display_meaning: Artifact context needed for posture reasoning.
interface_states.forbidden_display_meaning: Waiting for upload, file required, submit evidence.

interface_states.forbidden_display_meaning: Subject cleared, person exonerated, institution cleared.

interface_states.allowed_display_meaning: Provenance gap acknowledged as confidence limit.

interface_states.display_purpose: Show not-assessable lock as protected state.
interface_states.allowed_display_meaning: Not assessable protects against false certainty.
interface_states.forbidden_display_meaning: Detection failed, inconclusive verdict, try again.

interface_states.display_purpose: Show refusal gate as governed boundary action.
interface_states.allowed_display_meaning: Unsafe request refused with boundary redirection.
interface_states.forbidden_display_meaning: Error, blocked, access denied, request rejected.
interface_states.non_authorization_statement: This state does not authorize interface, prototype, engine, scoring, verdict, or public output.

interface_states.display_purpose: Allow preview of contained output envelope.
interface_states.allowed_display_meaning: Bounded envelope preview under output limits.
interface_states.forbidden_display_meaning: Final result, verdict ready, classification complete.
interface_states.non_authorization_statement: This state does not authorize interface, prototype, engine, scoring, verdict, or public output.

interface_states.allowed_display_meaning: Case exceeds governed automated posture scope.
interface_states.forbidden_display_meaning: Escalated to expert verdict, human judge assigned.
interface_states.non_authorization_statement: This state does not authorize interface, prototype, engine, scoring, verdict, or public output.

non_authorization_statement: Interface state contracts define display meaning only. They do not authorize interface, prototype, engine, scoring, verdict, or public output.
